name: Pastor James Dut
bio: Pastor James has led the congregation for over 15 years with a vision for biblical teaching and community transformation.

name: Elder Samuel Akol
bio: Elder Samuel oversees pastoral care, counseling, and discipleship within the church family.

name: Deaconess Mary Ayen
bio: Mary leads the women's fellowship with a passion for prayer, mentorship, and community outreach.

name: Daniel Lual
bio: Daniel leads the next generation with energy and creativity, overseeing youth ministry and Sunday worship.
